## GroupBoxParams interface

The parameters for configuring a visual box in the user interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
interface GroupBoxParams extends FlexibleDirectionalLayoutParams, ElementParams 
```
**Extends:** FlexibleDirectionalLayoutParams, [ElementParams](./openrct2-flexui.elementparams.md)

BoxContainer\[\]
